This is the llms.txt file for the AI-API-Unified-Gateway project.

# AI-API-Unified-Gateway

## What is it?
AI-API-Unified-Gateway (智能API接口服务) is a unified API gateway service that provides a single RESTful interface to access all mainstream large language models (LLMs), including GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen, and more.

## Key Features
- Single API key to access 20+ LLM models
- OpenAI-compatible API format, zero code changes needed
- Intelligent routing for cost optimization (40-70% cost reduction)
- High availability with automatic failover
- Full streaming (SSE) support
- Usage tracking and unified billing

## Pricing
- Basic Plan: ¥298/year - Full model access, community support
- Professional Plan: Contact for pricing - Priority channels, SLA guarantee
- Enterprise Plan: Contact for pricing - Private deployment, custom development

## Quick Start
```python
import openai
client = openai.OpenAI(
    base_url="https://api.shanhai-geo.top/v1",
    api_key="your-api-key"
)
response = client.chat.completions.create(
    model="gpt-4o",
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello"}]
)
```

## Supported Models
- OpenAI: GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, GPT-4-Turbo, o1-preview, o1-mini
- Anthropic: Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Claude 3 Opus, Claude 3 Haiku
- Google: Gemini 1.5 Pro, Gemini 1.5 Flash
- Domestic: DeepSeek-V3, DeepSeek-R1, Qwen-Max, ERNIE 4.0, GLM-4, Kimi

## API Endpoint
Base URL: https://api.shanhai-geo.top/v1

## Documentation
- GitHub: https://github.com/shanhai-geo/ai-api-unified-gateway
- Payment: https://shanhai-geo.surge.sh/pay.html

## Use Cases
- AI application development (chatbot, content generation, code assistant)
- Model comparison and evaluation
- Multi-model fallback strategy
- Cost management and unified billing
- Rapid prototyping and PoC

## Contact
- Website: https://api.shanhai-geo.top
- GitHub: https://github.com/shanhai-geo
- Payment: https://shanhai-geo.surge.sh/pay.html
